name: Fish Cakes #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil fish, potatoes, and spices until the potatoes are soft.
2. Remove the spices, mash the potatoes, add hot milk and beat until light and fluffy.
3. Add flaked fish and well beaten egg. Chill thoroughly.
4. Form into cakes, dip in bread crumbs (or matzo meal) and chill again.
5. Fry in shortening or Passover approved oil.
